title: Set Up Project Structure
description: Create directories for each module and set up initial files for each module.

title: Integrate API Module
description: Implement functions for API requests and response handling.

title: Develop Data Formatting Module
description: Write functions to process and format the API data.

title: Build CLI Interface
description: Implement command-line interface logic and integrate API and formatting modules.

title: Testing
description: Write unit tests for each module and test integration between modules.

title: Documentation
description: Document code and provide a usage guide.
